creator: julien@perdition.city
text:
Hello,

Would it be possible to cherry-pick commit 193abbe6b117a91f5348789a2e92bfedb340f921 (https://github.com/zrepl/zrepl/commit/193abbe6b117a91f5348789a2e92bfedb340f921) and include it in the zrepl port?

zrepl is crashing after a few hours, and a simple patch seems to fix it, see https://github.com/zrepl/zrepl/issues/629#issuecomment-1257145189

Thanks!
